pages.page_purpose: Hook — the Wellness Recall arrives; danger meter joke starts

panels.location: Zoo City street, night rain, under flickering FusionZoo billboard
panels.action: Courier drone drops a glowing pastel envelope into Moodz's mitts; squad huddles under the dying billboard light
panels.caption: FusionZoo never calls to say hi.
panels.visual_notes: Rain sheen scene mode; billboard signage 'FUSIONZOO - UPGRADE YOURSELF' (approved); palettes separated by rain greys; compose in layers (bg plate + two 3-lead groups)
panels.continuity_notes: Street matches Emo ref #973 backdrop; billboard = Ed.4 signage

panels.location: Zoo City street, tight on group
panels.camera_angle: close-up on notice prop, faces behind
panels.action: The notice unfolds itself, cheerful pastel type (text applied at lettering)
panels.dialogue: STATIC: "Danger level: four." / TWOTONE: "Of five?" / STATIC: "Of four."
panels.visual_notes: Notice as blank pastel prop; Static shake lines ON; reserve top fifth for three balloons
panels.continuity_notes: STARTS running joke: Static's danger meter

pages.page_purpose: Escalate — the Annex door; Moodz leads where he once hesitated

panels.location: Annex wing exterior door, service alley
panels.camera_angle: medium, from behind Moodz facing the door
panels.action: Green light bleeds from under a rusted door; Moodz studies his reflection in wet glass
panels.caption: The Annex is where the truth lives. The marketing lives out front.
panels.visual_notes: FIRST green glow of issue, confined to door seam; reflection echo of Ed.4
panels.continuity_notes: Annex established Ed.2; deliberate Ed.4 corridor-reflection echo

panels.action: NeonBlue bounces on his toes; Ash stares at the glowing door seam
panels.emotion: clashing readings of the same door
panels.dialogue: NEONBLUE: "A free update! That's basically a gift." / ASH: "Gifts knock."
panels.visual_notes: NeonBlue cyan root-glow subtle; Ash silver-white fringe over one eye half-lidded; balloons top third
panels.continuity_notes: Ad-copy joke continues; Ash <=4 words rule

panels.camera_angle: low angle on Moodz's mitt at the door
panels.action: Moodz pushes the door open into green dark; squad silhouettes behind
panels.visual_notes: Door swing spills a wedge of green across panel
panels.continuity_notes: Arc positioning: Ed.4 he hesitated at a door, now he leads

pages.page_purpose: Reveal — the Stayed; zombie faction on-page debut

panels.camera_angle: wide, deep one-point perspective down corridor
panels.action: Squad advances; a green pulse breathes from the far end
panels.visual_notes: Numbered chamber doors; institutional symmetry = menace
panels.continuity_notes: Corridor = Ed.4 facility design, aged/disused variant

panels.action: Shambling silhouettes resolve out of the green: exposed brains, stitched bodies, slow orbit-walk
panels.visual_notes: Zombies per faction ref #1997; swaying not lunging; tragic-funny not horror
panels.continuity_notes: ZOMBIE FACTION ON-PAGE DEBUT — resolves Ed.4 teaser

panels.action: Single zombie face fills panel: huge white eyes, pinprick pupils, rotten grin, brain glinting green
panels.caption: Not everyone walks away. Some monkeys just… stayed.
panels.visual_notes: Title-drop caption; tragic-funny face; caption box bottom
panels.continuity_notes: Caption pays off Ed.4 rear-cover line verbatim

pages.page_purpose: Peak — SPLASH: Chamber 0 orbited by the Stayed

panels.camera_angle: high wide angle looking down into the hall
panels.action: Cracked glass chamber leaking green pulses at center while the Stayed shuffle around it in slow orbit; squad tiny silhouettes in foreground doorway
panels.emotion: awe + sorrow; the thesis as an image
panels.caption: They never stopped fusing. There was always one more upgrade.
panels.visual_notes: ONLY splash; circular composition; squad breaks symmetry bottom-left; horde faceless-at-distance except 2 near figures; compose in layers over chamber plate
panels.continuity_notes: Cracked chamber = Ed.4 teaser image, now located: Chamber 0

panels.action: Patch (bitten ear, bone-stump arm) shuffles up to NeonBlue and stops, head tilted
panels.visual_notes: Patch = faction ref #1997 EXACTLY; NeonBlue smile mid-fall, hold it
panels.continuity_notes: NEW CHARACTER Patch; smile-drop wind-up, not the drop

panels.caption: Patch went in with NeonBlue, years ago. Only one of them came back out.
panels.visual_notes: THE smile-drop panel (once per issue); glow edge dimmed 50%
panels.continuity_notes: Backstory consistent with Ed.4 insecurity; logged as new lore

panels.emotion: the saddest joke in the issue
panels.dialogue: PATCH: "You… stopped?" / NEONBLUE: "I— I took a break. Breaks are self-care."
panels.visual_notes: Patch head-tilt sincere; NeonBlue ad-copy voice cracking; he is never the butt

pages.page_purpose: Turn — the building wakes; Moodz aborts, calmly

panels.action: Chamber flares awake; floor lines light a path toward the squad; cracked screen: 'WELLNESS UPDATE READY. PLEASE HOLD STILL.' (text at lettering)
panels.visual_notes: Floor-line path = Ed.4 facility language corrupted; meter breaks its own scale; layered composition
panels.continuity_notes: Auto-protocol is PRESSURE not physics — nobody on platform, cannot commit (world bible rule 1)

panels.action: Moodz walks the lit path and holds the abort switch down. Calm. The green flickers.
panels.emotion: mastery where panic used to live
panels.caption: Last time, he screamed. This time he just knew where the button was.
panels.visual_notes: Institutional symmetry CLAIMED by Moodz — he owns the center frame; quiet echo of Ed.4 'STOP IT'
panels.continuity_notes: Direct arc payoff of Ed.4; abort-during-sync canon since Ed.4

pages.page_purpose: Land — appetite can't be unplugged; the door stays open

panels.action: Chamber powers down. The Stayed sway, still whispering
panels.dialogue: THE STAYED: "more…" / SCARLINE: "You can't unplug appetite."
panels.visual_notes: Scarline's ONE line of the issue — full quiet; red streak catches last green
panels.continuity_notes: Scarline speech law: one clear sentence, once

panels.action: Squad files out; Moodz stops TwoTone's mitt on the door — leaves it open
panels.visual_notes: 'Their terms' = TwoTone's Ed.4 line handed back; stage on TwoTone's reaction
panels.continuity_notes: Ed.4 closing exchange inverted; door-open = new open thread

panels.location: Annex threshold, from inside looking out
panels.camera_angle: wide, Patch small against rain-lit open doorway
panels.action: Patch stands at the threshold. Looking at the rain. Not crossing. Not leaving.
panels.emotion: the whole issue in one held breath
panels.caption: Choice is the upgrade.
panels.visual_notes: Grey rain world outside vs green interior — two worlds one frame; max negative space
panels.continuity_notes: Caption = Ed.4 closing thesis paid forward; PATCH AT THRESHOLD = open thread

pages.page_purpose: Door-to-next — home through the rain; rooftop watcher teaser

panels.action: The squad walks home; the Annex glow shrinks behind them
panels.dialogue: ASH: "Loud in there." / STATIC: "Danger level: zero. …One."
panels.visual_notes: Bookend of 1.1, same street reversed; danger meter lands last beat; backs to camera (layered comp)
panels.continuity_notes: Squad exits unchanged and by choice — franchise voice

panels.camera_angle: low angle up at rooftop edge
panels.action: A silhouette watches the squad go, red domino mask catching neon; a pastel recall notice flutters in its mitt
panels.caption: Someone else got the recall notice too.
panels.visual_notes: Silhouette ONLY — mask + hoodie outline; do NOT reveal design; notice prop repeats 1.1
panels.continuity_notes: NEW OPEN THREAD -> next issue: Super faction
